title: Opening for Category Manager at Ajio Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Opening for Category Manager at Ajio Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Ajio Advisory Limited, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Category Manager for our Noida operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Ajio Advisory Limited:
Ajio Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in A/B Testing
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in Content Writing
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Flexible working hours
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Ajio Advisory Limited!
